message:
feat(render-term): add ASCII art renderer for text-only terminal output

Add ascii.rs (463 lines) providing a pure-ASCII fallback renderer for
terminals that lack Unicode/box-drawing support. This complements the
existing Unicode-based terminal renderer by offering a degraded but
functional output path for constrained environments (e.g., legacy
terminals, CI logs, screen readers).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
